09 May 2026 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Tensions Remain High As Washington Awaits Iran's Peace Proposal Response RFE/RL 09 May 2026 -- Iran blamed the United States for a recent escalation of skirmishes in the Persian Gulf as Washington awaits a response from Tehran over the latest proposal to end their war.

  • Missiles and drones locked on US targets: 'Awaiting firing order,' IRGC commander warns Press TV 09 May 2026 -- The commander of the Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) Aerospace Force has stated that Iran's advanced missiles and aerospace drones are fully locked on American targets and enemy ships across the Persian Gulf region, with forces standing by for the final order to strike.
  • IRGC Navy: Any attack on Iranian vessels will trigger heavy response against US bases Press TV 09 May 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) Navy has warned the United States and its allies, saying that any attack on Iranian tankers or commercial vessels in the Persian Gulf or beyond will trigger a heavy and decisive response targeting American military centers in the region and enemy ships.

  • Trump Says Expects Iranian Response To Peace Proposal In Next Few Hours RFE/RL 09 May 2026 -- US President Donald Trump on May 8 said he expects an answer from Tehran to the latest US peace proposal within the next few hours, as hopes again rise that an agreement to end the nearly 70-day war was possible.
  • Secretary Rubio's Meeting with Qatari Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs Al Thani US Dept. of State 09 May 2026

  • Iranian Foreign Minister Accuses US Of 'Destructive Approach' RFE/RL 09 May 2026 -- Iran's foreign minister has held a phone call with his Turkish counterpart, during which he criticized what he called Washington's "destructive approach" to "the diplomatic process," Iranian media reported on May 9.
  • May 9: Iran reaffirms its red lines, vowing decisive response to any new US attack in Persian Gulf Press TV 09 May 2026 -- Senior Iranian military and political officials have warned the United States that any further acts of aggression in the Persian Gulf would trigger direct and decisive strikes against American bases and warships across the region.
  • US-Israeli strategy to weaken Iran's core industries failed: Vice president Press TV 09 May 2026 -- Iranian Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref says the United States and the Israeli regime failed in their strategy to weaken Iran's core industries through bombing key petrochemical and steel plants during a 39-day military aggression against the country that began in late February.

  • UN chief urges maximum restraint to avoid further escalation in Hormuz Strait: spokesperson People's Daily 09 May 2026 -- UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres urges all sides to exercise maximum restraint to avoid further escalation following the exchange of fire in the Strait of Hormuz, a UN spokesman said Friday.

  • Iran: Statement by the Spokesperson on the situation of Narges Mohammadi European External Action Service (EEAS) 09 May 2026 -- The European Union is deeply alarmed by reports of the serious health condition of human rights defender and Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi, who is currently in detention in Iran.

  • In Talks With Vance, Qatari PM Urges All Sides To Focus On Diplomacy RFE/RL 09 May 2026 -- Qatari Prime Minister Muhammad bin Abdulrahman al-Thani called for all warring parties to utilize diplomacy and not arms to find an end to the war in the Middle East.
  • UK Destroyer Deployed To Middle East For Possible Hormuz Mission RFE/RL 09 May 2026 -- Britain will deploy a Royal Navy destroyer to the Middle East ahead of a planned multinational mission to protect commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, the UK Defense Ministry said on May 9.

  • US intel community agreed Iran was not developing nukes before war: Ex-NCC chief Press TV 09 May 2026 -- The United States intelligence community agreed that Tehran was not developing a nuclear weapon before the 40-day war on Iran, says a former US "counterterrorism" chief.
  • CIA admits Iran can withstand blockade for months, maintains 70% of its missiles: Report Press TV 09 May 2026 -- The US spy agency admits Iran is able to withstand the effects of the US blockade for several months and also retains significant missile and drone stockpiles, casting doubt on US President Donald Trump's claim that Tehran needs the war to end immediately, a report says.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • U.S. Marine Corps Strengthens Arctic Readiness with Campaign - Alaska USMC News Release 09 May 2026 -- The United States Marine Corps has launched "Campaign - Alaska," a strategic initiative to enhance its operational capabilities in the Arctic.

  • Putin vows Russia will win against NATO-backed aggression at Victory Day parade Press TV 09 May 2026 -- President Vladimir Putin says Russian soldiers are confronting "an aggressive force" armed and supported by the entire NATO alliance in the country's military campaign in Ukraine.

  • Over 10 military units are now equipped with a Ukrainian AI-powered turret capable of destroying UAVs with a single button press Ukraine MOD 09 May 2026 -- The Ministry of Defence of Ukraine continues to develop lower-tier air defense capabilities to protect against enemy UAVs along the line of contact and in frontline areas.

  • Regular Press Briefing of the Ministry of National Defense on May 9, 2026 PRC MND 09 May 2026
  • Commissioning of 'five essentials for aircraft carriers' a significant achievement of PLA Navy's accelerated transformation, development: MND spokesperson Global Times 09 May 2026 -- When asked to comment on the Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) Navy's successful commissioning of all "five essentials for aircraft carriers," including stealth carrier-based fighters, multirole catapult-assisted carrier-based fighters, fixed-wing carrier-based early warning aircraft, fixed-wing electronic warfare aircraft, and anti-submarine helicopters, Senior Colonel Jiang Bin, a spokesperson for the Ministry of National Defense, stated on Saturday that this is a vital link in forming the systematic combat capability of aircraft carrier formations and a significant achievement in the PLA Navy's accelerated transformation and development.Jiang said building a strong PLA Navy embodies the century-old aspiration of the Chinese nation to grow into a maritime power and serves as an important guarantee for the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation.
  • China, Thailand to hold Strike 2026 joint army training PRC MND 09 May 2026 -- China-Thailand Strike 2026 joint army training will be held in Thailand in mid-and-late May of 2026, said Senior Colonel Jiang Bin, spokesperson for China's Ministry of National Defense (MND), at a press briefing on Saturday.

  • New defense bill threatens payment deadline for U.S. HIMARS: President CNA 09 May 2026 -- President Lai Ching-te (賴清德) said Saturday that the initial payment for the U.S.-made High Mobility Artillery Rocket Systems (HIMARS), due by May 31, may not be completed in time due to a defense bill passed by the Legislature on Friday.
  • Analysts see passage of scaled-down defense bill as 'positive first step' CNA 09 May 2026 -- Taiwan's opposition-controlled Legislature approved a scaled-down defense budget on Friday, a move analysts viewed as a "positive first step" despite concerns that delays to local defense programs could hurt Taiwan's long-term military buildup.
  • U.S. lawmakers, State Department welcome Taiwan's defense budget approval CNA 09 May 2026 -- Two members of the U.S. Congress and the State Department on Friday welcomed the Legislative Yuan's approval of a supplementary defense budget, saying the funding would strengthen Taiwan's deterrence capabilities against Chinese aggression.

  • 10th Australia-India Defence Policy Talks Australia DOD 09 May 2026 -- The 10th Australia-India Defence Policy Talks were held in New Delhi on 8 May. The Indian delegation was led by Joint Secretary Shri Amitabh Prasad, while the Australian side was led by First Assistant Secretary International Policy Mr Bernard Philip.

  • Major breakthrough in Hypersonic Missile development: DRDO conducts extensive long-duration test of Actively Cooled Full Scale Scramjet Combustor India PIB 09 May 2026 -- Defence Research & Development Laboratory (DRDL) of DRDO has achieved a path-breaking milestone in the development of Hypersonic Missiles by successfully conducting an extensive long-duration test of its Actively Cooled Full Scale Scramjet Combustor.
  • ICGS ACHAL Commissions in Indian Coast Guard India PIB 09 May 2026 -- The Indian Coast Guard marked a significant enhancement in its operational capability with the commissioning of Indian Coast Guard Ship (ICGS) Achal, the latest vessel in the new-generation Adamya-class Fast Patrol Vessel series, at Goa Shipyard Limited on May 09, 2026. Named Achal, meaning 'firm', the vessel symbolizes the Indian Coast Guard's steadfast commitment towards safeguarding national maritime interests, protecting life at sea, and ensuring the security of India's maritime frontiers.
  • India conducts successful flight-trial of Advanced Agni missile with Multiple Independently Targeted Re-Entry Vehicle system India PIB 09 May 2026 -- India conducted the successful flight-trial of an Advanced Agni missile with Multiple Independently Targeted Re-Entry Vehicle (MIRV) system from Dr APJ Abdul Kalam Island, Odisha on May 08, 2026. The missile was flight-tested with multiple payloads, targeted to different targets spatially distributed over a large geographical area in the Indian Ocean Region.
  • IOS SAGAR ARRIVES AT CHATTOGRAM, BANGLADESH DURING MULTINATIONAL DEPLOYMENT India PIB 09 May 2026 -- Indian Ocean Ship (IOS) Sagar arrived at Chattogram, Bangladesh on 08 May 2026 as part of the IOS SAGAR 2026 deployment. The visit aims to further strengthen maritime cooperation and professional ties between the Indian Navy and the Bangladesh Navy.

  • 'Vivid embodiment of all-weather strategic cooperative partnership': Chinese MND on delivery of first Qilin-class conventional submarine to Pakistan Global Times 09 May 2026 -- A spokesperson for the Chinese Ministry of National Defense (MND) said on Saturday that the delivery of the first Qilin-class conventional submarine to Pakistan, also known as Hangor-class submarine, PNS/M Hangor, represents normal military equipment cooperation between the two countries and serves as a vivid embodiment of their all-weather strategic cooperative partnership.

  • Navy welcomes prospective offshore patrol vessel BRP Rajah Lakandula Philippine News Agency 09 May 2026 -- The Philippine Navy (PN) announced the conduct of arrival ceremonies for the prospective offshore patrol vessel (OPV), BRP Rajah Lakandula (PS-21), at the Naval Operating Base Subic, Zambales on Friday.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots | Roaring Lion (Lebanon)

  • Hezbollah: Israel cannot deter Palestinian resistance through assassinations Press TV 09 May 2026 -- Hezbollah has offered its deep condolences to the Hamas resistance movement over the assassination of a senior leader's son in an Israeli airstrike in eastern Gaza, stressing that targeted killings and brutalities can never deter Palestinian resistance factions.
  • Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon kill 20 more civilians Press TV 09 May 2026 -- At least twenty people, including a civil defense rescuer, have been martyred after Israeli aerial raids targeted a number of areas in southern Lebanon, despite a ceasefire between the Beirut government and the Tel Aviv regime.

  • UN says Israeli attacks displaced 40,000 Palestinians in occupied West Bank Press TV 09 May 2026 -- The United Nations has warned that Israeli military attacks and settler violence in the occupied West Bank have displaced around 40,000 Palestinians over the past year.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Footage obtained by Global Times shows Philippine aircraft harassing Chinese scientific research vessel in Houteng Jiao Global Times 09 May 2026 -- According to China Coast Guard (CCG) spokesperson Jiang Lue, on May 6, China's scientific research vessel Xiangyanghong 33 conducted routine ecological environment surveys in waters near China's Houteng Jiao. During the operation, a Philippine Coast Guard Islander aircraft deliberately approached and harassed the vessel.
  • ASEAN pushes for early conclusion of SCS Code of Conduct Philippine News Agency 09 May 2026 -- The Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) is renewing its push for the immediate conclusion of negotiations for a legally binding Code of Conduct (COC) in the South China Sea (SCS) to manage disputes and reduce tensions in disputed maritime areas.

  • Duterte replaces lead counsel Kaufman ahead of ICC trial Philippine News Agency 09 May 2026 -- Former president Rodrigo Duterte has decided to replace his lead counsel Nicholas Kaufman ahead of his trial before the International Criminal Court (ICC), the latter confirmed on Friday night.

  • The OIC Condemns the Attack on Khartoum Airport and Other Areas in Khartoum State Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 09 May 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) has condemned in the strongest terms the drone attack on Khartoum International Airport and other strategic areas in Khartoum State, Republic of Sudan

News Reports

  • WHO chief heads to Tenerife to oversee Sunday arrival of hantavirus-hit ship UN News 09 May 2026 -- The Director-General of the World Health Organization (WHO), Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, has issued a direct plea for calm and solidarity to the citizens of Tenerife ahead of the scheduled arrival of the MV Hondius on Sunday
  • Message by the WHO Director-General to the people of Tenerife regarding the hantavirus response WHO 09 May 2026 -- Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, briefed media today on a cluster of hantavirus cases linked to a cruise ship, the MV Hondius.

  • Victory Parade on Red Square President of Russia 09 May 2026 -- President of Russia and Supreme Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of the Russian Federation Vladimir Putin attended the military parade marking the 81st anniversary of Victory in the Great Patriotic War of 1941-1945.
  • Russian Defence Minister Andrei Belousov reviews parade marking 81st anniversary of Victory in Great Patriotic War on Red Square in Moscow Russia MoD 09 May 2026
  • Russian Defence Minister Andrei Belousov congratulates servicemen and veterans on Victory Day Russia MoD 09 May 2026
  • Meeting with President of the Republic of Abkhazia Badra Gunba President of Russia 09 May 2026 -- Vladimir Putin met with President of the Republic of Abkhazia Badra Gunba, who arrived in Moscow for celebrations marking the 81st anniversary of Victory in the Great Patriotic War.
  • Meeting with President of Republika Srpska Sinisa Karan President of Russia 09 May 2026 -- Vladimir Putin met with President of Republika Srpska Sinisa Karan, Speaker of the National Assembly of Republika Srpska Nenad Stevandic, President of the Alliance of Independent Social Democrats party Milorad Dodik, and Head of the Republika Srpska Mission to the Russian Federation Dusko Perovic.
  • Meeting with President of Laos Thongloun Sisoulith President of Russia 09 May 2026 -- Vladimir Putin met at the Kremlin with President of the Lao People's Democratic Republic Thongloun Sisoulith, who arrived in Russia to take part in the Victory Day celebrations.
  • Meeting with Supreme Ruler of Malaysia Sultan Ibrahim President of Russia 09 May 2026 -- Vladimir Putin met with Supreme Ruler of Malaysia Sultan Ibrahim who had arrived in Moscow for celebrations marking the 81st anniversary of Victory in the Great Patriotic War.
  • Russia-China interaction is most important factor in stabilizing int'l relations: Putin Global Times 10 May 2026 -- Interaction between Russia and China is the most important factor in stabilizing international relations, Russian President Vladimir Putin said Saturday.
  • Russia's oil, gas budget revenues drop 38 pct in first four months of 2026 People's Daily 09 May 2026 -- Russia's oil and gas budget revenues fell by 38.3 percent year-on-year in the first four months of 2026, dropping to 2.298 trillion rubles (about 30.95 billion U.S. dollars), the Russian Ministry of Finance announced Friday on its website.

  • Statement: FCDO summons Chinese Ambassador UK FCDO 09 May 2026 -- The Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office summoned the Chinese Ambassador on Friday 8 May following convictions under the National Security Act.
  • US imposes sanctions on Chinese firms over alleged aid to Iran's defense sector Press TV 09 May 2026 -- The US Treasury Department has imposed sanctions on ten individuals and companies, several of them based in China and Hong Kong, for their alleged involvement in helping Iran obtain weapons and the necessary raw materials for its Shahed drones and ballistic missiles.
  • China, France shoulder important responsibilities for upholding int'l peace, stability, development: top diplomat Global Times 09 May 2026 -- China and France, as permanent members of the UN Security Council and major independent countries, shoulder important responsibilities for upholding international peace, stability and development, China's top diplomat Wang Yi said on Friday.

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 09 May 2026

  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Sends Greetings to Russian President KCNA 09 May 2026 -- The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un sent a message of greeting to Comrade Vladimir Vladimirovich Putin, president of the Russian Federation, on May 9.

  • Stop forming blocs and stoking camp confrontation: Chinese MND spokesperson responds to Japan-Philippines defense minister joint statement Global Times 09 May 2026
  • Japan urged to stop hypocritical self-glorification: China's MND slams Takaichi's 'a free and open Indo-Pacific' claim during visits to Australia, Vietnam Global Times 09 May 2026 -- A spokesperson for the Chinese Ministry of National Defense (MND) on Saturday urged Japanese authorities to stop their hypocritical self-glorification and rein in their dangerous ambition of military expansion and war preparation, in responding to claims made by Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi during visits to Australia and Vietnam.
  • Japan Should Take Concrete Actions to Atone for Its Past Crimes: Defense Spokesperson PRC MND 09 May 2026 -- "We firmly oppose the Japanese government using the so-called 'free and open Indo-Pacific' and 'security cooperation' as pretexts to incite bloc confrontation, form exclusive 'small circles', undermine the strategic security and interests of other countries, and find excuses for its military buildup," said Senior Colonel Jiang Bin, spokesperson for China's Ministry of National Defense (MND), at a press briefing on Saturday.

  • ASEAN stands by 5-point consensus on Myanmar Philippine News Agency 09 May 2026 -- The Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) has reaffirmed its commitment to the Five-Point Consensus as the primary framework in addressing Myanmar's political crisis.

  • Mélenchon vows to withdraw France from NATO if elected president Press TV 09 May 2026 -- The leader of the France Unbowed movement (La France Insoumise) has declared his intention to withdraw France from NATO if he is elected president.

  • Bahrain Arrests 41 Over Alleged Links To Iran's Revolutionary Guards RFE/RL 09 May 2026 -- Bahrain's Interior Ministry said on May 9 that security forces had dismantled an organization accused of links to Iran's Revolutionary Guards Corps and arrested 41 suspected members amid heightened regional tensions linked to the conflict in the Middle East.
  • Bahraini forces arrest dozens over sympathizing with Iran amid US-Israeli aggression Press TV 09 May 2026 -- Bahraini regime forces have abducted dozens of people on suspicion of sympathizing with Iran, and glorifying Iranian retaliatory operations amid the US-Israeli war of aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • HE GCCSG Commends the Efficiency of Bahrain's Security Services in Uncovering a Cell Linked to the Iranian Revolutionary Guard; Reaffirms Full GCC Support for the Kingdom's Security Measures Gulf Cooperation Council 09 May 2026
  • Saudi Arabia Expresses Full Support for Bahraini Measures Against Activities Threatening Its Security and Stability SPA 09 May 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs expressed the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's full support for the measures taken by the Kingdom of Bahrain in response to activities identified as undermining national security and seeking to destabilize its security and stability

  • Global oil inventories at lowest since 2018 amid war against Iran: Report Press TV 09 May 2026 -- Global oil inventories have reached their lowest level in the past eight years as the US-Israeli aggression against Iran and Tehran's retaliation continue to deplete stockpiles, according to a new report.
